title: Polygala oreotrephes
taxonomy: Polygala oreotrephes is classified as a species within the genus Polygala, which belongs to the family Polygalaceae. This family is part of the larger order Fabales, and the class Magnoliopsida. The genus Polygala is a group of flowering plants commonly known as milkworts. Polygala oreotrephes is endemic to the southwestern region of Western Australia. It is considered a rare species within its native range.
